title: MTR Beijing Subway Addon 北京地铁扩展
description: Added some Beijing Subway items in MTR
body:
# MTR Beijing Subway Addon The Beijing Subway Addon is an official extension of [FangSu Blocks](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fangsu-blocks) . ## How to Use it
- Download this pack and FangSu Blocks - Place both packs in the resource pack folder - Load these two resource packs in the game - Enter the game , enjoy it ## Main Content
- Beijing Subway Screen Doors - Beijing Metro PIDS - Beijing Metro Ticket Barriers - Beijing Metro Ad Boards - Beijing Bus Stop Signs - Beijing Subway route info sign - ...More # 北京地铁扩展包
北京地铁扩展包是[方速·方块包](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fangsu-blocks)的一个官方扩展. ## 如何运行
- 下载这个包合方速·方块包 - 将这两个包放到资源包文件夹中 - 在游戏中加载这两个资源包 - 进入游戏即可 ## 主要内容
- 北京地铁屏蔽门 - 北京地铁PIDS - 北京地铁检票闸机 - 北京地铁广告板 - 北京公交站牌 - 北京地铁线路信息牌 - ...等
